Name: Human
Description: Versatile and ambitious people found in nearly every land and culture.

Name: Elf
Description: Graceful long-lived folk with keen senses and a strong tie to magic and nature.

Name: Dwarf
Description: Stout resilient people known for craftsmanship tradition and life beneath mountains.

Name: Halfling
Description: Small cheerful wanderers famed for luck hospitality and surprising bravery.

Name: Gnome
Description: Clever curious inventors and illusionists with boundless enthusiasm.

Name: Half-Elf
Description: Adaptable people who blend human drive with elven grace and insight.

Name: Half-Orc
Description: Powerful determined folk respected for their strength endurance and fierce loyalty.

Name: Tiefling
Description: People with infernal heritage often recognized by horns tails or unusual eyes.

Name: Dragonborn
Description: Proud draconic humanoids known for their breath weapon and strong honor code.

Name: Tabaxi
Description: Feline wanderers driven by curiosity storytelling and a love of discovery.
